title: senecio boluangensis
intro: Senecio boluangensis, also known as Boluang ragwort, is a plant species native to Madagascar. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio boluangensis include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, due to its ability to inhibit bacterial growth and soothe the digestive system. Senecio boluangensis can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or infusing its leaves in oil for topical applications, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
